title: Limonium ruizii
taxonomy: Limonium ruizii is classified in the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Plumbaginaceae and the order Plumbagales. This classification indicates that Limonium ruizii belongs to the group of flowering plants known as plumbaginoids. The genus Limonium is a type of salt-tolerant and succulent plant, which includes various species. Limonium ruizii is a species within this genus and is likely native to a region with a coastal or semi-arid climate. The classification of Limonium ruizii is based on its morphological characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
